article.noComments: No comments yet, be the first!

aiDescriptions.none: This piece was primarily written by the author without AI generation or polishing.
aiDescriptions.polish: AI was used for wording and polish, while the ideas and content remained authored by the writer.
aiDescriptions.dictation: AI helped turn speech or dictation into a draft that was later revised by the writer.
aiDescriptions.assisted: AI helped with structure, partial drafting, or research support, then the writer substantially revised it.
aiDescriptions.generated: AI produced a significant portion of the draft, which the writer then curated and edited.
aiDescriptions.translated: AI was primarily used to produce this language version from an original written in another language.

comment.openComposerHint: Click to open the comment editor
comment.markdownHelpSuffix: , including headings, lists, links, and code blocks.
comment.reviewRequired: Your comment will appear after approval.

moments.title: Fragments
moments.subtitle: Short notes, passing thoughts, and half-formed ideas resting here for a while.
moments.detailMissing: This moment is unavailable or no longer exists.

timeline.title: Footsteps
timeline.subtitle: Chapters and fragments arranged by time, so the path of thought stays visible.
timeline.noMore: You've reached the beginning for now

articlesPage.title: Chapters
articlesPage.subtitle: Longer writing, shaped thoughts, and finished notes gathered into one quiet archive.

friends.title: Neighbors
friends.subtitle: A quiet place for sites I keep returning to, with room left for future encounters too.
friends.directoryNote: These are sites worth revisiting, and you're welcome to bring your own corner of the web here too.
friends.fallbackDescription: No description yet, but still enough to make the visit feel inviting.
friends.empty: It's still quiet here for now, but it won't stay that way forever.
friends.submitNote: If you'd like to keep a doorway open between our sites, you're welcome to leave your details here.
friends.submitClosedNote: Friend-link submissions are paused for now. This section will reopen when I am ready to review new sites again.
friends.ruleAvailability: A reachable site with clear basic information is enough to start.
friends.ruleOriginality: Ongoing sites with a distinct voice are especially welcome.
friends.ruleReciprocal: If convenient, you're also welcome to add this site to your own links first.
friends.previewDescription: A short introduction to your site will appear here.
friends.submitSuccess: Received. I will review it soon, and it will appear here once approved.
friends.submitFailure: That did not come through. Please try again.
